title: auganthus saxatilis
intro: Auganthus saxatilis, also known as Wood Betony, is a perennial plant in the mint family that grows in woodlands and dry slopes. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Auganthus saxatilis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Auganthus saxatilis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
